# STRAT.064 ? Deep Work (Newport)

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** self_development
**Domain:** SELF_DEVELOPMENT
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Focused work without distraction; shallow vs deep; attention residue; fixed schedule productivity; boredom embrace; quit social media

## Application
Protect deep work time; eliminate distractions; batch shallow work; set boundaries; embrace boredom; ruthless social media; depth over busyness

## Key Values
- Deep focus
- Distraction elimination
- Depth
- Boredom tolerance
- Attention management

philosophy, strategic-framework, self_development
